decisions.rationale: Covers simple to complex without shell quoting pain
Modern CLI convention, no home dir pollution
Composable transport for mocking, exponential backoff with jitter

next_action: Run /gsd:discuss-phase 2 --auto to start Phase 2: Full API Coverage (notes, tasks, comments, lists, entries, objects, attributes, files, meetings, webhooks, workspace members)
context_notes: Phase 1 fully shipped with 87+ tests passing. All infrastructure layers validated end-to-end. Phase 2 is pure pattern repetition — 11 more resource groups following the exact same records.py pattern. No new architectural decisions needed. The attio_client.py will need new methods for each resource, and each resource gets its own command file registered in attio_cli.py.
